_readme: PLACEHOLDER content. Replace the copy below with the official raffle rules when finalized. While 'status' is 'placeholder', the site shows a small 'Draft' badge and a 'rules coming soon' note. Set 'status' to 'live' to remove them.
headline: Loyalty, finally repaid before the parade
intro: Every month, the 401jK community gives back to the people who hold the line. No paperwork, no forty-year wait — just a clean monthly draw and a prize paid straight to your wallet. Here's the gist while the official rules are finalized.

steps.title: Hold the bag
steps.body: Hold at least one 401jK NFT in your Solana wallet to be eligible. (Placeholder rule — exact eligibility, including any $401jK threshold, will be confirmed in the official rules.)

steps.title: You're entered
steps.body: Every eligible wallet is automatically entered in that month's draw. No forms, no permission slips, no asking the system nicely.

steps.title: We draw
steps.body: Starting July 2026, one winner is drawn each month using a transparent, verifiable method. The more the collection grows, the bigger the pot.

steps.title: Winner announced
steps.body: The winner is posted publicly on X and Reddit, and the prize is sent directly to their wallet. Receipts on-chain, story in the open.

prizeNote: Prize details are announced with each monthly draw.
rulesNote: Full official rules drop soon. This section is a draft — terms, eligibility, and prize structure are subject to change before the first draw.
